dj_text: From Min Ven Min Ven, we move to Fang Mig I En Brandert. A few more in the queue. 5 left to go.
commercial_text: Breaking news from That Pirate Bot DJ — the playlist is in control now. The DJ has been demoted to button-pusher.
hijack_text: You're listening to Smooth Jazz FM from Dimension K-7. Mmm.
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Fang Mig I En Brandert
